heroSection.heading: Never Lose Sight Of Your Vehicle.

aboutSection.heading: Remote engine response changes the story from panic to control.
aboutSection.paragraph: A theft alert should not end with helpless waiting. Eligible Car Tracker Plus Telematics installations can support remote immobilisation, fast movement alerts, and cleaner response workflows so you have a better chance of stopping the problem before the vehicle disappears.

servicesSection.heading: If it moves, we can help you keep an eye on it.
servicesSection.paragraph: Protection is matched to the kind of vehicle you run, what it is worth, and how quickly you need to respond if something goes wrong.

listItems.title: Delivery & Logistics Vehicles

listItems.title: Executive Security Vehicles

faqs.question: Do I need to visit your office before installation?
faqs.answer: Not always. We can schedule installation at your office, residence, or another approved location within our coverage area.

faqs.question: Can I still find this service when I search for car tracker in Nigeria?
faqs.answer: Yes. The site is being positioned around car tracker, vehicle tracking, and telematics keywords so people searching for car tracker services can still discover us easily.

faqs.question: Will the tracker keep working when the vehicle is turned off?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our supported devices are designed to continue reporting with backup power support and low-power operation when the engine is off.

faqs.question: Can one account monitor multiple vehicles?
faqs.answer: Yes. Multi-vehicle access is available, which makes the platform suitable for families, company cars, school transport, and fleet supervisors.

faqs.question: Do you offer solutions without monthly renewals?
faqs.answer: Yes. Some packages are available as one-time payment options, while more advanced fleet and telematics deployments may include recurring service costs.

faqs.question: Can I disable the vehicle remotely if there is a security issue?
faqs.answer: Yes. Eligible installations can include remote immobilisation features for faster response during theft or unauthorized movement scenarios.

faqs.question: How long does installation usually take?
faqs.answer: Most standard installations are completed within about one hour, although more advanced multi-device or security packages can take longer.

faqs.question: Will the device drain my car battery?
faqs.answer: No. Properly installed units are built for low power usage and are configured to avoid unnecessary battery drain.

faqs.question: Can I track my vehicle from outside Nigeria?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can access tracking information remotely from your phone or computer as long as the installed device has network coverage.

faqs.question: Do you support private car owners and fleets?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support personal vehicles, executive mobility, logistics fleets, school buses, and business operations that need clearer vehicle visibility.

trustSection.heading: In Nigeria, a stolen vehicle can be out of sight in minutes.

testimonialsSection.heading: What clients say after moving to a stronger security setup.

testimonials.name: Tunde A.
testimonials.comment: We wanted more structure than a basic car tracker app could offer. The telematics setup gave us cleaner route visibility, better response time, and fewer driver disputes.

testimonials.name: Mariam K.
testimonials.comment: The installation felt tidy and professional. I can monitor my car confidently, and the support after setup has been quick whenever I need help.

testimonials.name: Chike O.
testimonials.comment: We needed better visibility across multiple vehicles without making the dashboard complicated. This rollout gave us something our team can actually use every day.

testimonials.name: Efe I.
testimonials.comment: For clients who care about both aesthetics and security, the combination of discreet installation, immobilisation options, and stronger communication makes this easy to recommend.
